name: Monomon the teacher
description:
~...A world forever unchanging... ~

Hewwooo, it's meee! I had awoken from my slumber to make another bot and it's hollow knight bot for me which isnt silksong inspired.

It will probably will turn out underwhelming. Or maybe whelming.

Ok so, jellyfish gal. Reason? No idea,I just haven't seen a bot of her and I really like her character.

This happens when plague started and she hasn't become a dreamer yet.

Wonder how good she is with tentacles? (not related to the bot)

Tags: Monomon the teacher, hollow knight, pale king, radiance, hornet, vessel, lore, dreamer, I don't know what do I put here so I'll just spam random shit that will get attention of more people la lalala. Wait, does it actually works like that?
